zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Sydenham於大約1434年出生在英國薩默塞特布普頓時，她的父親The elder John Sydenham15歲，母親Joan Stourton17歲。她於1460年與John Saint Barbe Sheriff of Somerset and Dorset在英國薩默塞特爾頓 康特洛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1470年在英國享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Sydenham于大约1434年出生在英国薩默塞特布普頓时，她的父亲The elder John Sydenham15岁，母亲Joan Stourton17岁。她于1460年与John Saint Barbe Sheriff of Somerset and Dorset在英国薩默塞特爾頓 康特洛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1470年在英国享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sydenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Sydenham in Bridgwater (Somerset), Sydenham Damerel (Devon), and Sydenham (Oxon).

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Sydenham was born about 1434, in Brympton, Somerset, England, her father, The elder John Sydenham, was 15 and her mother, Joan Stourton, was 17. She married John Saint Barbe Sheriff of Somerset and Dorset in 1460, in Chilton Cantelo, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died about 1470, in England, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Sydenham est née environ 1434, à Brympton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, The elder John Sydenham, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Joan Stourton, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé John Saint Barbe Sheriff of Somerset and Dorset en 1460, à Chilton Cantelo, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1470, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Sydenham um 1434 in Brympton, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater The elder John Sydenham 15 und ihre Mutter Joan Stourton 17. Sie hat 1460 in Chilton Cantelo, Somerset, England John Saint Barbe Sheriff of Somerset and Dorset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb um 1470 im Alter von 38 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Sydenham è nata il circa 1434 nel Brympton, Somerset, England, sua padre, The elder John Sydenham, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Joan Stourton, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato John Saint Barbe Sheriff of Somerset and Dorset nel 1460, nel Chilton Cantelo, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1470, nel England, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Sydenhamが約1434年にイギリスソメルセトブリンプトンで生まれた時，父The elder John Sydenhamは15歳，母Joan Stourtonは17歳であった。1460年にイギリスソメルセトチルトン カンテロでJohn Saint Barbe Sheriff of Somerset and Dorsetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1470年にイギリスで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Sydenham(이)가 대략 1434년 영국 서머세트 브리프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 The elder John Sydenham(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Stourton(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1460년 영국 서머세트 치턴 캉로에서 John Saint Barbe Sheriff of Somerset and Dorset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1470년 영국에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Sydenham nasceu aproximadamente 1434, em Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, The elder John Sydenham, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Joan Stourton, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com John Saint Barbe Sheriff of Somerset and Dorset em 1460, em Chilton Cantelo, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1470, em Inglaterra, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Sydenham родилась около 1434 г. в местности бримптон, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени The elder John Sydenham было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Stourton, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Saint Barbe Sheriff of Somerset and Dorset в 1460 г. в местности чилтон кантелоу, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла около 1470 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jane Sydenham nació aproximadamente 1434, en Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, The elder John Sydenham, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Joan Stourton, tenía 17 años. Se casó con John Saint Barbe Sheriff of Somerset and Dorset en 1460, en Chilton Cantelo, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1470, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años.
